summary: S&P 500 on pace for 9.3% April advance; Nasdaq up 14.3% — best month since 2020. Dow fell 280 pts on Apr 29. Big Tech earnings driving moves. Fed held rates at 3.5-3.75%. Oil prices elevated on Iran tensions. Alphabet +7%, Meta -6% on earnings.
